occurrence_sentence: Capitalizing on the region's eagerness to support such initiatives, CQC is poised to harness the potential of quantum resources, including EPB's quantum infrastructure, [EPB Quantum NetworkSM powered by Qubitekk](http://www.epbquantumnetwork.com), to prepare business, academic, and government organizations to optimize the benefits of the coming quantum age.
